Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents

This discussion is readable. Users discuss an open-source browser for AI agents, browser state capture, deterministic automation, and agent tooling.

One commenter compares Cloudflare, reCAPTCHA, captcha prompts, anti-bot checks, and headless browser detection as general web automation topics. This is normal discussion content, not a challenge interstitial.

Another commenter mentions that a browser for AI agents needs clear snapshots, source evidence, and careful state management. The page includes many readable comments, usernames, timestamps, and reply links.

Readable Hacker News comment text continues here so the extracted body is substantial. Open-source agent browser tooling can help developers inspect pages, cite sources, and compare browser automation strategies. A public discussion may mention Cloudflare or captcha many times while still being a normal readable page with HTTP 200 and a meaningful title.
